title: Groups module ships, GDS goes operational, first VCs onboard
content_html:
Four things landed on Cryptool this week.

The Groups module is live and ready for investment groups and syndicates to run pools end to end. The Global Data System (GDS), Cryptool's project and vesting database, is now fully operational. Profile and wallet pages are live too, with WalletConnect support and a tested Trust Wallet integration. And the first VCs and launchpads have onboarded to the platform.

Raise follows next week, bringing real transactions and paid subscriptions into the flow. Try it now at app.cryptool.io. New accounts plug straight into the referral programme.
author: Cryptool
